name: Handful of Peanuts
description: 30g roasted peanuts — instant protein boost with healthy fats. Keep a jar on your desk.

name: Glass of Milk
description: 250ml full-fat milk — complete protein with calcium and B12. The classic Indian booster.

name: 2 Boiled Eggs
description: 2 hard-boiled eggs — most bioavailable protein source. Can be prepped in advance.

name: Cup of Moong Sprouts
description: 1 cup sprouted moong — raw protein + digestive enzymes + Vitamin C. Sprout at home in 48 hours.

name: Paneer Cubes (30g)
description: 30g fresh paneer cubes with chaat masala — quick, satisfying protein hit.

name: Sattu Drink
description: 3 tbsp sattu in water with lemon and black salt — Bihar's ancient protein drink.

name: Greek Yogurt (Thick Curd)
description: 150g hung curd or Greek yogurt — gut-friendly protein. Add honey or fruit for taste.

name: Soya Chunks (Boiled)
description: ½ cup soya chunks soaked and boiled with spices — cheapest high-protein food in India.

name: Protein Bar
description: 1 whey/plant protein bar — convenient on-the-go booster. Check label for sugar content.

name: Cheese Slice
description: 1 processed cheese slice — quick calcium + protein. Add to toast, roti, or eat directly.

name: Roasted Chana
description: ½ cup roasted Bengal gram — ancient Indian snack with high protein and fiber. Eat with jaggery.

name: Peanut Butter (2 tbsp)
description: 2 tbsp natural peanut butter on toast or with banana — protein + healthy fats combo.
